name: my-virtual-office-nodejs
description: Node.js recreation of My Virtual Office with a live canvas office, agents, chat, dashboard, and editable layout.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/agency.js && node --check public/portal.js && node scripts/test-workflow-resume.mjs && node scripts/test-imagery-generation.mjs && node scripts/test-office-state.mjs && node scripts/test-luxury-property-template.mjs && node scripts/review-premium-template-family.mjs
scripts.templates:refresh: npm run templates:gallery && npm run build:css
scripts.templates:imagery: npm run templates:gallery && node scripts/generate-template-imagery.mjs && npm run templates:gallery && npm run build:css
